• Procedurally generated mining world with custom textures, AOE drilling, and explosive items.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT, host‑election, admin controls, chat, inventory, shop, and save system.
  • Responsive UI with mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, modals, and sound engine.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

The application creates a tile‑based mining game where players move, drill, and build using a deterministic seed.

Networking synchronizes player actions, host election, and chat while a shop lets users upgrade ships and purchase consumables.

UI components adapt to desktop and mobile, featuring custom gauges, a minimap, and modal dialogs for settings, inventory, and trading.
